text: ## Installation **No installer needed — just download and run.** 1. Go to [Releases](https://github.com/ezeiq7/smart-clipboard/releases/latest) 2. Download both `Smart Clipboard.exe` and `SmartClipboard_1.ico` 3. Put both files in the same folder anywhere on your PC 4. Run `Smart Clipboard.exe` once 5. Follow the 30-second onboarding 6. Done — the app starts automatically with Windows from now on

## Installation **No installer needed — just download and run.** 1. Download `Smart Clipboard.exe` from [Releases](https://github.com/ezeiq7/smart-clipboard/releases/latest) 2. Put both files in the same folder 3. Run Smart Clipboard.exe 4. Run it once — it registers itself to start with Windows automatically 5. Follow the 30-second onboarding 6. That's it — the app lives in your system tray
